title: Criminal history information; access to federal tax information
doc_html:
§254.3. Criminal history information; access to federal tax information

            The Louisiana Department of Health, Medicaid eligibility section, is authorized to perform criminal history records checks of current and prospective employees, contractors, and subcontractors in accordance with the procedures provided in R.S. 15:587.5. Pursuant to this authorization and to implement the requirements of R.S. 15:587.5, the secretary shall promulgate rules and regulations with regard to this matter.

            Acts 2017, No. 147, §3, eff. June 12, 2017; Acts 2018, No. 206, §2.
doc_text:
§254.3.  Criminal history information; access to federal tax information
The Louisiana Department of Health, Medicaid eligibility section, is authorized to
perform criminal history records checks of current and prospective employees, contractors,
and subcontractors in accordance with the procedures provided in R.S. 15:587.5.  Pursuant
to this authorization and to implement the requirements of R.S. 15:587.5, the secretary shall
promulgate rules and regulations with regard to this matter.
Acts 2017, No. 147, §3, eff. June 12, 2017; Acts 2018, No. 206, §2.
